---
title: "Third Meeting Record"
---

## Meeting Description

Date / Time: 31 March 2026 (4pm - 4.30pm)

Location: Zoom Meeting

Attendees: Xi Zixun, Wang Zhuoran, Jin Qinhao

## Purpose

Review for Shiny App modules and poster discussion.

## Meeting Notes

1. Reviewed the Shiny app modules, their design direction, and the requirements for the final submission.
2. Discussed the final poster arrangement and what still needed to be finished before submission.

## Action Item - Owner & Deadline

1. Xi Zixun (1 April 2026): Complete the user guide section for the Shiny app visual analysis module.
2. Wang Zhuoran (1 April 2026): Finalise the poster design and complete the user guide section for time series clustering.
3. Jin Qinhao (1 April 2026): Complete the user guide section for the forecasting module.

## Expected Deliverables

1. Finalised poster design.
2. Completed user guide.
